name: strategic-implementation
description: Outcome-first planning-to-execution workflow: clarify → product brief → optional UI mockup → plan-mode execution plan → tiered review → deliverable-gated execution. Per-repo documentation registry. v3.6 adds harness-fired hooks for deterministic simplify trigger, edit-thrashing, error-loop, and validation-log surfacing. v4.2 externalizes per-feature artifacts to a shared private GitHub store (gh-CLI adapter + per-repo locator + read-through cache), with stages rewired fallback-safe and conversational feedback replacing file-edit channels. v4.3 removes the obsolete long-running-session drift machinery (chapter rotation + per-turn goal evaluator), bakes a ponytail-style YAGNI hierarchy into plan drafting and the simplify reviewer, and adds an in-plugin frontend taste discipline (slim tier for mockups, rich tier for shipped UI). v4.4 (Leanness Pass II) prunes the unused BM25 memory/recall subsystem, the mid-execution simplify pass and the edit-thrashing hook, and duplicated store/entry-check boilerplate; renames the plan-review simplify agent to plan-simplify; net-removes substantial code while keeping pre/post simplify, the error-loop and deviation-surface breakers, and the externalized store. v4.5 (Convergence & Invariant Pass) adds two plan-time fields (Convergence audit, Source-of-truth touchpoints) and execution-plan rules 10–11 so the find-and-converge decision and write/read multiplicity become reviewable artifacts; alignment owns an always-on convergence check, tests requires invariant + multi-step journey tests on any source of truth with >1 reader/writer, and the review pre-filter gains matching mandatory triggers — no new agent. v4.6 (Maintainer & Convention Pass) makes the future developer/maintainer the spec's second user: the brief gains a strategic-altitude Maintainer view (reuse couplings + documented-per-repo-conventions), execution-plan gains a shared-component creation bar (rule 12 — leaf primitive needs ≥2 current/named consumers; abstraction layer may be scaffolded only when grounded in the architecture doc), a doc-generation obligation (Docs to update/create `to-create:`), and a sequencing rubric (rule 13 — unblock → reuse → create shared → per-domain → e2e last); ui-mockup surveys conventions (docs/Figma/similar surfaces, not just tokens), renders the edit in place against dimmed unchanged surfaces, and codifies resolved conventions into the registry; alignment enforces the bar, doc obligation, and sequencing — no new agent.
